---
name: Feature Request | 功能建议
about: 建议一个新功能或改进 | Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 功能描述 | Feature Description

<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你想要的功能 -->
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want -->

## 🎯 使用场景 | Use Case

<!-- 描述这个功能的使用场景和动机 -->
<!-- Describe the use case and motivation for this feature -->

**作为 | As a** [用户角色 | user type]
**我希望 | I want** [功能描述 | feature description]
**以便 | So that** [实现的目标 | goal to achieve]

## 🚀 期望行为 | Expected Behavior

<!-- 描述这个功能应该如何工作 -->
<!-- Describe how this feature should work -->

## 🔧 实现建议 | Proposed Solution

<!-- 如果你有实现思路，请描述。这只是一个建议，不是必须的 -->
<!-- If you have implementation ideas, describe them. This is optional -->

## 🔄 替代方案 | Alternative Solutions

<!-- 你考虑过的其他解决方案 -->
<!-- Alternative solutions you've considered -->

## 📊 优先级 | Priority

<!-- 这个功能对你的重要性 -->
<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->

- [ ] 🔴 高 | High - 阻塞我使用项目 | Blocking my use of the project
- [ ] 🟡 中 | Medium - 会显著提升体验 | Would significantly improve experience
- [ ] 🟢 低 | Low -  nice to have | Nice to have

## 🌐 相关引擎 | Related Engine

<!-- 这个功能涉及哪个仿真引擎？ -->
<!-- Which simulation engine does this feature relate to? -->

- [ ] 通用/核心 | General/Core
- [ ] VASP
- [ ] LAMMPS
- [ ] Abaqus
- [ ] Ansys
- [ ] COMSOL
- [ ] GROMACS
- [ ] Multiwfn
- [ ] 其他 | Other: ___________

## 🌐 仓库来源 | Repository Source

<!-- 你是从哪个仓库访问的？| Which repository are you accessing from? -->

- [ ] GitHub (https://github.com/toki0413/math-anything)
- [ ] Gitee (https://gitee.com/crested-ibis-0413/math-anything)

## 📝 其他信息 | Additional Context

<!-- 任何其他关于这个功能的信息 -->
<!-- Any other context or screenshots about the feature request -->

**感谢你的建议！我们会认真考虑。**

**Thank you for your suggestion! We will consider it carefully.**
